• Renders a procedurally‑generated mining world with day/night cycle, weather, and a station hub.
  • Implements player movement, drilling, building, inventory, upgrades, explosives, and a multiplayer sync layer.
  • Provides UI elements: mobile controls, chat, minimap, settings, shop, admin panel, and custom texture support.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Game.init();

This file defines a full‑featured browser game called “Mega Miner NG”. It handles map generation, player actions, networking, sound, and a rich UI using CSS‑based bevel borders and responsive layout. Additional features include save‑system, cloud sync, custom textures, and an extensible modal system for prompts and forms.
